title: Update Shared Setting
content:
# Update Shared Setting

Updates an existing Shared Setting  `payload` with any new values.

## Endpoint

`POST /users/shared/settings/{setting_name}/update`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.user.updateSharedSettings()
print(response)

parameters.name: setting_name
parameters.description: The Shared Setting key `setting_name`. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.

payload.description: The new payload for the Shared Setting. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Shared Setting being updated.

created.description: UTC time when the Shared Setting was created, formatted in RFC 3339.

created_by.description: The User who created the Shared Setting, represented by a KRN.

payload.description: The Shared Settings. The structure of this `payload` object depends on the type of Shared Setting being defined.

updated.description: UTC time when any Shared Setting keys were last updated, formatted in RFC 3339.

updated_by.description: The User who updated the Shared Setting, represented by a KRN.
